_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The 0% base rate over 49 windows confirms coil behavior and the divergent factors (no new stablecoin growth, rising leverage) suggest the path of least resistance is sideways-to-lower rather than recovery continuation.
next_move.brains_agree: No — the analyst forward-calls Disbelief (recovery continuation) while the narrative implies further deterioration; the judge sides with neither directional extreme and holds on statistical grounds.
next_move.confirmed_if: stablecoin_growth breaks above 45 AND mvrv_zscore reclaims 30 with funding staying below 50 — genuine accumulation beginning
next_move.invalidated_if: funding spikes above 65 OR btc_momentum_30d rolls over below 45 while VIX holds above 55 — leverage unwind with macro fear breaks the coil downward
